item.title: Shakshuka 🍅🍳 One of my all time favorites Ingredients -Red bel...
item.description:
Shakshuka 🍅🍳 One of my all time favorites Ingredients -Red bell pepper -Onion -Tomatoes (I used a mix of fresh and fire roasted canned tomatoes) -Garlic -Paprika -Coriander -Cumin seeds / ground cumin -Chili powder -Oregano -Salt -Eggs Toppings -Parsley -Mint -Yogurt Serve with some crusty bread or pita!
#cooking #shakshuka #recipe #breakfast

item.title: Parmigiana di melanzane🍆🍅 Straight from the garden for Mami Ing...
item.description:
Parmigiana di melanzane🍆🍅 Straight from the garden for Mami Ingredients -Eggplant -Fresh tomatoes, Passata, Pomodorini… depends on preference and availability (: -Mozzarella -Parmigiano Reggiano DOP -Basil -Salt -Black Pepper -Flour -Frying Oil -Extra Virgin Olive Oil
#cooking #recipe #italy #eggplant #parmigiano #travel

item.title: LASAGNE VERDI🇮🇹 in my new kitchen! Recipe from Evan Funke’s coo...
item.description:
LASAGNE VERDI🇮🇹 in my new kitchen! Recipe from Evan Funke’s cookbook but I forgot to cook the pancetta first separately I recommend that. For the spinach pasta dough: -Fresh spinach -Eggs (about 4 to 5 large eggs) -00 flour -Salt (add to water before blanching spinach) For the Bolognese ragu: -Extra virgin olive oil -Unsalted butter -Yellow onion -Celery stalks -Carrot -Pancetta -Beef chuck (or ground beef) -Pork shoulder (or ground pork) -Dry red wine -Tomato passata -Beef or chicken stock -Salt -Black pepper For the béchamel: -unsalted butter -flour -whole milk -salt -Fresh nutmeg For assembly: -Parmigiano Reggiano -Unsalted butter for greasing pan
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.description:
Tortilla Española 🇪🇸 Ingredients -Yellow Potatoes -Eggs -Onion -Olive oil -Salt -Pepper -Optional topping: Jamón Ibérico

item.title: LOBSTER ROLLS 🦞 INGREDIENTS For the lobster: -Whole fresh lobste...
item.description:
LOBSTER ROLLS 🦞 INGREDIENTS For the lobster: -Whole fresh lobster or raw lobster tails or claws -4 tbsp unsalted butter (for a brown butter) -Flakey sea salt For the filling: -1 tbsp good quality mayo (you can also omit this entirely I just couldn’t decide and it’s good) -2 celery stalks -Fresh tarragon -Fresh chives -1 lemon (zest and juice) -Pinch of white or black pepper -Flaky sea salt to taste For the homemade buns: -360g bread flour -7g instant yeast -25g granulated sugar -28g nonfat dry milk powder(substitute with 200g lukewarm whole milk) -9g fine sea salt -28g unsalted butter -1 large egg -198g to 255g lukewarm water (start with less and add if needed. Omit if using whole milk instead of milk powder) -1 large egg plus splash of whole milk for egg wash -Melted butter for finishing For the chips: -2 large yellow potatoes -Neutral oil for frying -Flaky sea salt -Old Bay Seasoning (optional but quite nice)
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: Ceviche on the beach with refreshing Atlética. Find it at athl...
item.description:
Ceviche on the beach with  refreshing Atlética. Find it at athleticbrewing.com or at a retailer near you INGREDIENTS -Atlética Athletic Brewing -500g fresh halibut,mahi mahi, or tilapia -Juice of 8 to 10 limes -1-2 tomatoes -Red onion -1 to 2 serrano chiles -Fresh cilantro -1 avocado -Salsa macha -Salt to taste -Tostadas for serving
@AthleticBrewing #ad #AthleticBrewing
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: PASTA ALLE VONGOLE INGREDIENTS -Clams -Garlic -Parsley -Calabria...
item.description:
PASTA ALLE VONGOLE INGREDIENTS -Clams -Garlic -Parsley -Calabrian chili (or red pepper flakes) -Cherry Tomatoes -Salt -Dry white wine -Linguine or Spaghetti

item.title: BANANA BREAD COFFEE CAKE 🍌 INGREDIENTS For the streusel -3/4 cu...
item.description:
BANANA BREAD COFFEE CAKE 🍌 INGREDIENTS For the streusel -3/4 cup all purpose flour -5 tbsp brown sugar -1/4 cup granulated sugar -2 tsp cinnamon -Pinch of salt -5 tbsp unsalted butter, cold and cubed For the cinnamon swirl -1/2 cup brown sugar -1 and 1/2 tsp cinnamon For the batter -3 very ripe bananas -1/2 cup unsalted butter -1/2 cup brown sugar -1/4 cup granulated sugar -2 eggs -1 tsp vanilla extract -1/4 cup full fat sour cream -1 and 3/4 cups all purpose flour -1 tsp baking soda -1/2 tsp baking powder -1/2 tsp cinnamon -1/2 tsp fine salt For the glaze -1 cup powdered sugar -2 to 3 tbsp milk -1/2 tsp vanilla extract
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: Lemon Ricotta Cake inspired by the Duo mini bag and charms 🍓🍋 ...
item.description:
Lemon Ricotta Cake inspired by the Duo mini bag and charms 🍓🍋 Get yours now! Ingredients For the cake -190g all purpose flour -2 tsp baking powder -1/2 tsp fine salt -250g whole milk ricotta, room temperature -200g granulated sugar -3 large eggs, room temperature -120ml neutral oil or melted unsalted butter -Zest of 2 lemons -2 tbsp fresh lemon juice -1 tsp vanilla extract For the macerated strawberries -300g fresh strawberries, hulled and sliced -2 tbsp granulated sugar -Juice of half a lemon -Zest of half a lemon For finishing -Powdered sugar for dusting -Fresh lemon zest -Heavy whipping cream, lightly whipped with a bit of powdered sugar and lemon zest *I recommend serving the whipped cream on the side so the cake lasts longer. A nice dusting of powdered sugar for presentation on top of the cake is perfect!*
@kate spade new york
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: Coxinha paired with Sublime Sauvignon Blanc. Bright, crisp and...
item.description:
Coxinha paired with Sublime Sauvignon Blanc. Bright, crisp and exactly the right pairing for enjoying the match!⚽️⚽️⚽️ Ingredients -Ménage à Trois Sublime Sauvignon Blanc -Chicken thighs or breast -Chicken stock -Yellow onion -Garlic -Bay leaf Catupiry or cream cheese -Green onions -Fresh parsley -All purpose flour -Unsalted butter -Eggs -Breadcrumbs -Neutral oil for frying -Salt -Black pepper
@Menage Wines #menageatroispartner #MatchDay #football
